title: Shadda-Bi-Boran (species)

The '''Shadda-Bi-Boran''' were a race of green-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shadda-Bi-Boran/Legends|Shadda-Bi-Boran]]. A peaceful [[Star/Legends|sun]]-worshipping civilization, the Shadda-Bi-Boran faced extinction in [[43 BBY/Legends|43 BBY]] when their [[Shadda-Bi-Boran system|system's]] [[Shadda (star)|star]] began to die, depriving them of radiation without which they could not produce vital enzymes. The plight of the Shadda-Bi-Boran became a [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] ''cause célèbre'', but all efforts to relocate them ended in failure, and the last of the species died in [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]].

==Biology==
The Shadda-Bi-Boran were a humanoid species distinguished by their large black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and green skin. They were dependent on unique [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] emitted by their star, [[Shadda (star)|Shadda]], to produce vital enzymes to break down toxins.

==History==
Eons before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the star [[Shadda (star)|Shadda]] expanded into a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]]. The cooling star emitted a unique radiation that gave life to the people of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shadda-Bi-Boran/Legends|Shadda-Bi-Boran]]. The species became a peaceful society ruled by sun priests.

Tragedy struck the Shadda-Bi-Boran in [[43 BBY/Legends|43 BBY]] when it was discovered that Shadda was cooling into a [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] and would soon undergo a [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]]. Because the Shadda-Bi-Boran thrived on radiation emitted by the star, they could not be evacuated to just any world. The Shadda-Bi-Boran's plight became a galactic ''cause célèbre'', with armbands and kerchiefs of handcrafted [[Shadda silk]] becoming popular symbols of concern and solidarity.

The [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]] attempted to locate planets with similar stars to relocate the Shadda-Bi-Boran; a young [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] assisted in relocating a colony which included [[N'a-kee-tula]], whom Padmé befriended offworld. However their efforts were in vain; entire colonies died off within months due to their failure to adapt.

The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] made a last offer to the Shadda-Bi-Boran to put them in stasis or to be frozen in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] until a new home could be found, but it was refused. The last of the [[Species/Legends|species]] died in [[38 BBY/Legends|38 BBY]].
